country.name: Malaysia
country.chinese_buy: 蜡染、宋吉锦与传统零食
country.tip: Pasar Payang is a good starting point for textiles and traditional snacks.
country.chinese_tip: Pasar Payang 是寻找纺织品和传统小吃的好起点。

products.name: BOH Cameronian Gold tea tin
products.note: Choose a sealed tin for easier packing.
products.chinese_name: BOH 金马仑高原金牌茶罐

products.why_buy: It is a light, polished gift for tea drinkers.
